question.label: Recognized work
question.name: What work do you think gets recognized here instead?
question.description: Drills into his stated recognition gap to surface the model he believes the organisation rewards.

answer: I want clearer criteria, not reassurance.

assessment.note: Names the absence of clear recognition criteria rather than reassurance — a strong clarity deficit signal; [THREAD-DEFERRED] 'clearer criteria' could be picked up next session.

new_queue.label: Concrete path
new_queue.name: What concrete path forward feels real to you right now?

new_queue.label: Next step from me
new_queue.name: What do you need from me to make the next couple of weeks steadier?

history.answer_excerpt: I have been less present in rituals, yes.
I have been less present in rituals, yes.
After the promotion decision, I was not clear on what really needed to change.
I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.
I am not sure the work I am doing is the work that gets recognized.
I want clearer criteria, not reassurance.
